_meta.note: Phase 37 Wave 3 predicate-balanced single-hop query set (v1, D-07). Each query derived from the spike scratch.db typed edges (real edges extracted from Max's actual episodes). Anchors and golds are real node values present in the spike graph. Hi/mid queries authored blind to the graph (question-first, then reachability confirmed). Lo controls drawn from confirmed-reachable chains. Founder sign-off required before the precision gate runs (D-05).
_meta.K_source: recallNeighborhoodBudget=20 (src/lib/config.ts) — measured from live recall, not chosen
_meta.db_source: spike 004 scratch.db — real typed edges from Max's episodes

queries.question: Who built Haiku?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. Haiku is the Claude Haiku model built by Anthropic. Reachability confirmed: edge haiku|built_by|anthropic (w=1.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: Who built the text-embedding-3-small model?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. text-embedding-3-small is the OpenAI embedding model used by recense. Reachability confirmed: edge text-embedding-3-small|built_by|openai in spike DB.

queries.question: What project is Max currently working on?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. Max is the founder of recense. Reachability confirmed: edge max|works_on|recense (w=2.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What does the sleep pass work on?
queries.note: mid: authored blind. The sleep pass (offline consolidation) works on the judge model evaluation. Reachability confirmed: edge sleep pass|works_on|judge in spike DB.

queries.question: Which project is app.js a part of?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. app.js is the main file of the brain-memory viz. Reachability confirmed: edge app.js|part_of|viz (w=3.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What project does README.md belong to?
queries.note: mid: authored blind. README.md is part of the brain-memory project. Reachability confirmed: edge readme.md|part_of|brain-memory (w=2.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What model does the judge use?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. The recense judge uses Haiku (Claude Haiku 4.5). Reachability confirmed: edge judge|uses|haiku (w=4.0, highest weight) in spike DB.

queries.question: What embedding provider does recense use?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. recense uses the OpenAI API for embeddings. Reachability confirmed: edge recense|uses|openai (w=3.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What does the Qwen 3.6 35B model depend on to run locally?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. The Qwen 3.6 35B MoE model runs via Ollama on the local machine. Reachability confirmed: edge qwen3.6:35b-a3b|depends_on|ollama (w=2.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What interface does the local judge depend on?
queries.note: mid: authored blind. The local judge was wired through the ModelProvider seam in brain-memory. Reachability confirmed: edge local judge|depends_on|modelprovider seam in spike DB.

queries.question: What process manager does the brain-memory sleep-pass service run on?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. The sleep pass launchd service is managed by launchd on macOS. Reachability confirmed: edge com.brain-memory.sleep-pass|runs_on|launchd (w=3.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What runtime does brain-memory run on?
queries.note: mid: authored blind. brain-memory is a Node.js application. Reachability confirmed: edge brain-memory|runs_on|node (w=2.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: Where is the brain-memory project located on the filesystem?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. brain-memory lives at ~/brain-memory on Max's machine. Reachability confirmed: edge brain-memory|located_in|~/brain-memory in spike DB.

queries.question: What domain is app.vtxathlete.com located in?
queries.note: lo control: confirmed-reachable chain. app.vtxathlete.com is a subdomain of vtxathlete.com. Reachability confirmed: edge app.vtxathlete.com|located_in|vtxathlete.com in spike DB.

queries.question: What note-taking tool does recense integrate with?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. recense integrates with Obsidian via the obsidian-adapter. Reachability confirmed: edge recense|integrates_with|obsidian in spike DB.

queries.question: What tool does the ptc-mcp server integrate with?
queries.note: mid: authored blind. The ptc-mcp server is an MCP server that integrates with Claude Code. Reachability confirmed: edge ptc-mcp|integrates_with|claude code in spike DB.

queries.question: What did ingest-cli replace in the brain-memory project?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. The ingest-cli binary superseded the older sleep.js script. Reachability confirmed: edge ingest-cli|supersedes|sleep.js in spike DB.

queries.question: Which embedding model does text-embedding-3-large replace?
queries.note: lo control: confirmed-reachable chain. text-embedding-3-large superseded text-embedding-3-small as the higher-quality OpenAI embedding model. Reachability confirmed: edge text-embedding-3-large|supersedes|text-embedding-3-small in spike DB.

queries.question: What outreach method does Max prefer?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. Max prefers cold-dm as outreach (documented in CLAUDE.md voice profile). Reachability confirmed: edge max|prefers|cold-dm in spike DB.

queries.question: What style of action does Max prefer?
queries.note: mid: authored blind. Max prefers decisive high-leverage action per documented working style. Reachability confirmed: edge max|prefers|decisive high-leverage action in spike DB.

queries.question: What competing memory system did recense evaluate?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. recense evaluated Graphiti as a competing graph-based memory system. Reachability confirmed: edge recense|evaluated|graphiti (w=2.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What capability dimension did LongMemEval evaluate?
queries.note: mid: authored blind. LongMemEval evaluated the knowledge-update dimension (KU correctness). Reachability confirmed: edge longmemeval|evaluated|knowledge-update (w=3.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What environment file configures recense?
queries.note: hi: authored blind. recense is configured with sleep.env for model keys and settings. Reachability confirmed: edge recense|configured_with|sleep.env (w=2.0) in spike DB.

queries.question: What retrieval parameter is config.ts configured with?
queries.note: mid: authored blind. config.ts defines the candidateK retrieval parameter (top-K candidates for retrieval). Reachability confirmed: edge config.ts|configured_with|candidatek (w=2.0) in spike DB.
